Package org.springdoc.core.utils

Class SpringDocAnnotationsUtils

java.lang.Object
io.swagger.v3.core.util.AnnotationsUtils
org.springdoc.core.utils.SpringDocAnnotationsUtils

    • castDefaultValue

      public static Object castDefaultValue(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema schema, Object defaultValue)
      Attempt to cast the default value so that it matches the Schema type. If the value cannot be cast then the provided default value is returned as-is.
      Parameters:
      schema - the schema that will have the default value
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the cast default value

    • resolveDefaultValue

      objectMapper - the object mapper
      Returns:
      the object
